title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Air India SATS Global Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Air India SATS Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Air India SATS Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Air India SATS Global Group:
Air India SATS Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India SATS Global Group!
